message:
✨ Add UTM tracking, new event emitters, and live demo link (#1478)

- Add UTM parameter capture to analytics init (utm_source/medium/campaign/term/content)
- Add event emitters for Deploy, Compliance, Benchmarks, ClusterAdmin pages
- Add live demo link with UTM tracking to README
- Register 13 new custom dimensions and 3 custom metrics in GA4

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
